research_object: inter-reviewer Support agreement over 240 sealed multi-claim reference candidates
confusion_matrix_orientation: Reviewer A rows, Reviewer B columns
severity_interpretation: mean per-claim disagreement distance; complements rather than replaces kappa
diagnostic_metrics: citation exact-set agreement and mean Jaccard
reason-code exact-set agreement and mean Jaccard

worklist_partition.label_disagreement: support labels differ; label adjudication required
worklist_partition.diagnostic_followup: support labels agree but citation, reason, or confidence differs; label change forbidden
